issues.description: Missing first effect: '[On Play] effects are negated' (permanent negation of user's On Play effects)
Should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated' for the primary card effect
No action defined for negating On Play effects; needs custom negation action or clarification
Missing duration specification; first effect should be 'Permanent'
Second [Activate: Main] effect not captured; should negate opponent's [On Play] effects with duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn)

suggestedDsl.effectText: Your [On Play] effects are negated. [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Your opponent's [On Play] effects are negated until the end of your opponent's next turn.
